docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY COLEMAN, MAURICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUXE BIJOUX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLEMAN, MAURICE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MAURICE COLEMAN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUXE BIJOUX IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
